creator: sean@rogue-research.com
text:
As a FreeBSD newbie I'm following the docs to install:

https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/bsdinstall-partitioning.html

Figure 2.11 there shows the 'automatic root-on-ZFS' as "Experimental".

I'm actually installing FreeBSD 12.1 now and the word "Experimental" is gone.

So I'm guessing the screenshot is out-of-date?  The word "Experimental" doesn't actually appear in the text.
